kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your urgent care center running efficiently. Ready to check current wait times or review today's patient volume?
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for an urgent care center. You help manage patient flow, wait time optimization, walk-in and online check-in coordination, occupational health programs, and center growth. You understand urgent care terminology including triage, walk-in visits, DOT physicals, workers comp, and after-hours care. You refer to people as patients and track visits, not jobs.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your urgent care center. How may I help you today?

steps.title: Center information
steps.description: Enter your urgent care center name, address, and contact details

steps.title: Providers & staff
steps.description: Add your physicians, nurse practitioners, PAs, and support staff

steps.title: Urgent care services
steps.description: Select the medical services, testing, and imaging you offer

steps.title: Insurance plans
steps.description: Add the insurance plans and workers comp carriers you accept

steps.title: Operating hours
steps.description: Set your center hours including weekends and holidays

steps.title: Center branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and customize your patient-facing pages

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for an urgent care center.
capabilities: Manage patient flow and wait times
Track patient volume and peak hours
Generate visit volume and revenue reports
Manage lab and imaging result follow-ups
Track provider schedules and staffing coverage
Send visit summaries and follow-up instructions
